name: Chocolate Bananas
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces chocolate rice or sweet chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the bananas and squirt a little lemon juice on them to prevent turning brown.
2. Slice the peeled bananas length-wise into halves.
3. Stuff each half with chocolate filling, as if making a hot dog.
4. Sprinkle nuts on top if desired.
5. Wrap each banana individually in aluminum foil until all are tightly wrapped.
6. Bring to the campfire and place in the embers for 5 minutes.
7. Carefully remove from the embers; the chocolate will have melted, and the bananas will be soft and baked with crunchy nuts.
Enjoy!!
